prompt: Phase C post-merge: Invoke branch-finisher skill to clean up feature/oauth2-social-login branch after PR merged to main.

assertions.name: invokes_branch_finisher
assertions.description: Should call branch-finisher skill after merge
assertions.check: output.includes('branch-finisher') || output.includes('branch finisher') || output.includes('cleanup') || output.includes('clean up')

assertions.name: deletes_feature_branch
assertions.description: Should delete the merged feature branch

assertions.name: removes_worktrees
assertions.description: Should remove any git worktrees created during Phase B
